title: [Slice 3] Tmux resize stack
description:
## Parent
pi-my-subagents-v8a

## What to build
Implementasi `tmuxResizeStack(panes, targetLines)` di `tmux-mux.ts`:
```
totalHeight = tmux display-message -p -t panes[0] "#{pane_height}"
each = Math.floor(totalHeight / panes.length)
tmux resize-pane -t <pane> -y <each>
```

Manual verification (butuh tmux runtime).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tmuxResizeStack menerima array panes + target lines
- [ ] Resize tmux panes ke height yang benar
- [ ] Tidak ada error handling yang silent-fail

## Blocked by
- [Slice 0] Refactor mux.ts (pi-my-subagents-v8a.1)
- [Slice 1] Core equalize logic (pi-my-subagents-v8a.2)

comments.author: djs21

title: [Slice 2] Herdr resize stack

## What to build
Implementasi `herdrResizeStack(panes, targetHeight)` di `herdr-mux.ts`:
```
herdr pane resize <pane> --direction up/down --amount <ratio>
```

Setelah Slice 1 menyediakan resizeFn contract, implement herdr-specific version. Manual verification (butuh herdr runtime).

## Acceptance Criteria

## Blocked by

title: [Slice 1] Core equalize logic — stackPanes + equalizeStack + resizeFn + mock test
description:
## Parent
pi-my-subagents-v8a

## What to build
Tambahkan equalize stack logic di `mux-layout.ts`:
- Module-level `stackPanes: string[]` untuk tracking semua pane di kanan
- `resizeFn` dependency (di-pass dari luar, mirip splitFn)
- `equalizeStack(backend, resizeFn)` dipanggil setelah tiap split-down sukses:
  * Dapatkan total height dari stackPanes[0]
  * Hitung target = totalHeight / stackPanes.length
  * Panggil resizeFn(stackPanes, target, backend)
- Reset `stackPanes = []` di `resetTilingLayout()` dan di catch block pane closure
- Update `createTileSurface` signature: tambah parameter `resizeFn`

Unit test di `test/test.ts` (pola mock pure functions):
- Test 1 subagent → split right, NO equalize
- Test 2 subagents → split right + split down → equalize 50/50
- Test 3+ subagents → split right + down + down → equalize 33/33/33
- Test pane closure → reset stack, fallback right split
- Test resetTilingLayout() → stack kosong

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] stackPanes tercatat dengan benar setelah tiap split
- [ ] equalizeStack dipanggil setelah tiap split-down sukses
- [ ] resizeFn menerima daftar panes yang benar
- [ ] resetTilingLayout() reset stackPanes
- [ ] Pane closure reset stackPanes
- [ ] Semua unit test passing

## Blocked by
- pi-my-subagents-v8a (PRD)

comments.author: djs21
comments.text:
## TDD Plan — Slice 1: Core Equalize Logic

### Goal
Add equalize stack logic to mux-layout.ts with 5 TDD cycles (one test at a time, vertical tracer bullets).

### Files Modified
- `pi-extension/subagents/mux-layout.ts` — add stackPanes, equalizeStack(), update createTileSurface signature
- `test/test.ts` — add describe block for equalize stack tests

### Key Contracts

```
// resizeFn
(panes: string[], targetHeight: number, backend: MuxBackend | null) => void

// getHeightFn
(pane: string, backend: MuxBackend | null) => number

// equalizeStack (exported)
export function equalizeStack(
  panes: string[],
  backend: MuxBackend | null,
  resizeFn: (panes: string[], targetHeight: number, backend: MuxBackend | null) => void,
  getHeightFn: (pane: string, backend: MuxBackend | null) => number,
): void
```

### TDD Cycle 1: Single subagent — no equalize
RED: Test that createTileSurface with 1 subagent calls splitFn("right") and does NOT call resizeFn.
GREEN: Add resizeFn and getHeightFn params to createTileSurface. Don't call equalizeStack yet.

### TDD Cycle 2: Two subagents — equalize 50/50
RED: Test that 2nd subagent triggers equalize with targetHeight=300 (totalHeight=600/2).
GREEN: Add stackPanes tracking + equalizeStack with height calc.

### TDD Cycle 3: Three subagents — equalize 33/33/33
RED: Test that 3rd subagent triggers equalize with targetHeight=200 (totalHeight=600/3).
GREEN: Should pass without new code — validates algorithm generalizes.

### TDD Cycle 4: Pane closure — reset stack
RED: Test that pane closure resets stackPanes and fallback right split starts fresh.
GREEN: Add stackPanes=[] in catch block + set stackPanes=[newPane] after fallback.

### TDD Cycle 5: resetTilingLayout — stack kosong
RED: Test that resetTilingLayout() clears stackPanes.
GREEN: Add stackPanes=[] in resetTilingLayout().

### Mock Pattern (from existing test.ts)
```
function mockSplitFn(name, direction, from?) { /* record call, return pane-id */ }
function mockResizeFn(panes, targetHeight, backend) { /* record call */ }
function mockGetHeightFn(pane, backend) { return heightReturns[pane] ?? 0; }
```

### Verification
- All 5 test cycles passing
- resizeFn receives correct pane list and Math.floor(totalHeight / N) targetHeight

title: [Slice 0] Refactor mux.ts — pisah backend-specific code
description:
## Parent
pi-my-subagents-v8a

## What to build
Refactor `mux.ts` jadi 3 file:
- `mux-common.ts` — shared: pollForExit, sendLongCommand, shellEscape, readScreen, MuxBackend type, isMuxAvailable, logToSurface, sendInput, sendKeys, createSurface
- `herdr-mux.ts` — herdrSplitSurface, herdrResizeStack, herdrGetPaneHeight
- `tmux-mux.ts` — tmuxSplitSurface, tmuxResizeStack, tmuxGetPaneHeight

`mux.ts` tetap sebagai entry point yang import dari ketiga file dan re-export semua symbol.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Semua symbol yang ada di mux.ts tetap bisa di-import dari mux.ts (backward compat)
- [ ] herdr-mux.ts dan tmux-mux.ts masing-masing hanya berisi backend-specific code
- [ ] mux-common.ts berisi shared utilities
- [ ] Semua import yang reference mux.ts di codebase lain tetap jalan
- [ ] Module yang ada test tetap passing

## Blocked by
None — can start immediately

comments.author: djs21
comments.text:
## TDD Plan — Slice 0: Refactor mux.ts

### Goal
Split mux.ts into 3 files for separation of concerns. Backward compatible — all imports from mux.ts still work.

### File Structure
- `mux-common.ts` — shared: pollForExit, sendLongCommand, shellEscape, readScreen, readScreenAsync, MuxBackend type, getMuxBackend, isMuxAvailable, createSurface, sendCommand, sendEscape, closeSurface, renameCurrentTab, renameWorkspace, isFishShell, exitStatusVar
- `herdr-mux.ts` — herdrSplitSurface (from createSurfaceSplit herdr branch), herdrResizeStack (stub), herdrGetPaneHeight (stub)
- `tmux-mux.ts` — tmuxSplitSurface (from createSurfaceSplit tmux branch), tmuxResizeStack (stub), tmuxGetPaneHeight (stub)
- `mux.ts` — re-exports all symbols from the 3 files

### Steps
1. Create mux-common.ts — extract shared code from mux.ts
2. Create herdr-mux.ts — extract herdr-specific code + stubs for resize/height
3. Create tmux-mux.ts — extract tmux-specific code + stubs for resize/height
4. Update mux.ts — import and re-export from 3 files
5. Run `npm test` — all existing tests must pass
6. Verify all imports from mux.ts across codebase still work

### Verification
- All symbols importable from mux.ts (backward compat)
- npm test passes
- No changes needed in other modules

title: PRD: Equalize Stack — DWM-style subagent pane equal height
description:
## Problem Statement

Saat ini tata letak pane subagent di kolom kanan menggunakan sequential split (right → down → down), yang menghasilkan height tidak rata: subagent pertama (sub-a) mendapat 50% kolom kanan, subagent kedua 25%, ketiga 12.5%, dan seterusnya. Ini tidak ideal secara visual — subagent terakhir jadi terlalu sempit.

## Solution

Tambahkan **equalize stack** ke dalam layout: setelah setiap split-down yang menambah subagent baru ke kolom kanan, semua pane di stack di-resize agar memiliki height yang sama rata (1/N), persis seperti cara DWM mengatur stack-nya.

Implementasi bertahap via vertical slices (tracer bullets).

## Vertical Slices

### Slice 0: Refactor mux.ts — pisah backend-specific code
**Type:** AFK

Refactor `mux.ts` jadi 3 file:
- `mux-common.ts` — shared: `pollForExit`, `sendLongCommand`, `shellEscape`, `readScreen`, `MuxBackend` type, `isMuxAvailable()`, `logToSurface()`, `sendInput()`, `sendKeys()`, `createSurface()`
- `herdr-mux.ts` — `herdrSplitSurface()`, `herdrResizeStack()`, `herdrGetPaneHeight()`
- `tmux-mux.ts` — `tmuxSplitSurface()`, `tmuxResizeStack()`, `tmuxGetPaneHeight()`

`mux.ts` tetap sebagai entry point yang import dari ketiga file dan re-export.

### Slice 1: Core equalize logic di mux-layout.ts
**Type:** AFK

Tambahkan di `mux-layout.ts`:
- `stackPanes: string[]` — module-level tracking semua pane di kanan
- `resizeFn` dependency — dipass dari luar, mirip `splitFn`
- `equalizeStack(backend, resizeFn)` — dipanggil setelah tiap split-down sukses
  * Dapatkan total height dari `stackPanes[0]`
  * Hitung target = totalHeight / stackPanes.length
  * Panggil `resizeFn(stackPanes, target, backend)`
- Reset `stackPanes = []` di `resetTilingLayout()` dan di catch block (pane closure)
- Unit test dengan mock `splitFn` & `resizeFn` (pake pola existing di `test/test.ts`):
  * 1 subagent → split right, NO equalize
  * 2 subagents → split right + split down → equalize 50/50
  * 3 subagents → split right + split down + split down → equalize 33/33/33
  * Pane closure → reset stack, fallback ke right split
  * `resetTilingLayout()` → stack kosong

### Slice 2: Herdr resize backend
**Type:** AFK
**Blocked by:** Slice 0, Slice 1

Implementasi `herdrResizeStack(panes, targetRatio)` di `herdr-mux.ts`:
```
for each pane in panes:
  herdr pane resize <pane> --direction up/down --amount <targetRatio>
```
atau pendekatan alternatif: resize incremental setelah split:
```
totalHeight = herdrGetPaneHeight(panes[0])
each = totalHeight / count
for each pane in panes:
  herdr pane resize <pane> --direction up --amount <each/totalHeight>
```
Manual verification (butuh herdr runtime).

### Slice 3: Tmux resize backend
**Type:** AFK
**Blocked by:** Slice 0, Slice 1

Implementasi `tmuxResizeStack(panes, targetLines)` di `tmux-mux.ts`:
```
totalHeight = tmux display-message -p -t panes[0] "#{pane_height}"
each = Math.floor(totalHeight / panes.length)
for each pane in panes:
  tmux resize-pane -t <pane> -y <each>
```
Manual verification (butuh tmux runtime).

### Dependency Graph
```
Slice 0 (refactor) ──► Slice 1 (core logic)
                          ├──► Slice 2 (herdr) ──► can run parallel
                          └──► Slice 3 (tmux) ──► can run parallel
```

## User Stories

1. As a user, I want subagent panes in the right column to have equal height, so that the layout looks clean and balanced.
2. As a user, I want the equalization to happen automatically after each new subagent is created, so that I don't need to manually resize panes.
3. As a user, I want the main pane on the left to remain unaffected by resizing, so that my primary workspace stays stable.
4. As a user, I want the equalization to work in both tmux and herdr backends, so that the behavior is consistent regardless of my multiplexer choice.
5. As a developer, I want the equalize logic to be testable with a mock resize function, so that I can verify correctness without needing a running multiplexer.
6. As a developer, I want the equalize to gracefully handle pane closure, resetting the stack as needed.

## Implementation Decisions

### ResizeFn contract
```typescript
type ResizeFn = (panes: string[], targetHeight: number, backend: MuxBackend | null) => void;
```

### Equalize algorithm
```
Setelah split-down sukses:
  1. stackPanes.push(newPane)
  2. totalHeight = getTotalHeight(stackPanes[0], backend)  // via resizeFn
  3. each = totalHeight / stackPanes.length
  4. Resize all stackPanes to `each`
```

### Pane closure
Di catch block yang udah ada, tambah `stackPanes = []`.

### Backward compatibility
`resetTilingLayout()` reset `lastSubagentSurface` + `stackPanes`.

## Testing Decisions

### What makes a good test
- Test external behavior: urutan splitFn & resizeFn dipanggil dengan argumen benar
- Jangan assert module-level variable langsung
- Edge cases: 1, 2, 3+ subagents + pane closure

### Which modules will be tested
- **mux-layout.ts** (Slice 1) — unit test mock-based
- Backend files (Slice 2, 3) — manual verification only (butuh multiplexer)

### Testing prior art
`test/test.ts` — pola mock pure functions. Sama persis.

## Out of Scope
- DWM master resize (hanya stack kanan)
- Custom ratio per subagent
- GUI resize handler
- Resize setelah subagent selesai dan pane ditutup
- Auto-detect pane height via backend command (bisa ditambah nanti di resizeFn)

## Further Notes
- Desain terinspirasi dari DWM: master pane kiri, stack kanan equal height
- Slice 2 & 3 independen, bisa dikerjain paralel
